mainDressCode.title: Attire Guide
mainDressCode.description: We kindly ask that you choose shades aligned with our wedding motif.

sections.title: Principal Sponsors
sections.description: Male Principal Sponsors: Formal black suit with champagne gold tie. Female Principal Sponsors: Beige floor-length evening gown.

sections.title: Guests
sections.shortDescription: Gentlemen: Long sleeves and trousers. Ladies: Floor-length gown (no shades of white, please). Strictly no wearing of t-shirt, denim, slippers, and sport shoes.
